title: centaurea jankae
intro: Centaurea jankae, also known as the Balkan knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Centaurea jankae has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to possess various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Centaurea jankae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications, to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
